title: Ripple Lands $200 Million Financing Facility to Expand Institutional Crypto Brokerage
message_html: Ripple Lands $200 Million Financing Facility to Expand Institutional Crypto Brokerage ...
snippet: The XRP-linked Ripple secures financing from Neuberger Specialty Finance to fuel growth of its prime brokerage platform.

title: Circle Chases Agentic Growth to Scale Stablecoin Infrastructure
message_html: Circle Chases Agentic Growth to Scale Stablecoin Infrastructure ...
snippet: As cryptocurrency goes mainstream, the sector’s blockchain-native firms and builders are staring down a paradox. They are increasingly tasked with sustaining premium valuations while simultaneously absorbing the costs of expansion, compliance and platform development. That was the dominant narrative
